english translation text:
Salawat taught By
Imam Zainul Abideen (A.S.)
Mafateeh Al Jinaan (pg. 156)

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد
english translation text:
O Alláh send Your blessings on
Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.

In the name of Alláh,
the Beneficent, the Merciful.
the tree of prophet hood
and the abode of Your Messages,
the place of visits of the angels,
the mine of Your Knowledge
and the people of the Holy House of revelation.

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد الفلك الجارية
english translation text: O` Allah I bestow Your blessing on Mohammad and his progeny who are a boat sailing
in the deep waters of fathomless sea.
Safe is he who boarded it
and drowned is he who discarded it.
Those who went ahead of them were misled
and those legged behind them were ruined
and those who adhered to them were united with them.

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد الكهف الحصين
english translation text: O` Allah! Bless Mohammad and his progeny who are the strong refuge,
rescue for the distressed and the helpless,
shelter for the fugitives
and the protection of the seekers of protection.

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد صلاة كثيرة
english translation text: O` Allah! Bless Mohammad and his Progeny with plenty of Your blessings

arabic text: تكون لهم رضا ولحق محمد وآل محمد أداء وقضاء
english translation text: which should please them and for Mohammad and his family a fulfillment of obligation and its conclusion.

arabic text: بحول منك وقوة يا رب العالمين.
english translation text:
By Your strength and might,
O` the Lord of the Worlds!

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد الطيبين الأبرار الأخيار
english translation text: O` Allah! Bless Mohammad and his progeny, the pure, the virtuous, the good.
whose rights You have made obligatory
And made incumbent their obedience and acknowledge their mastership.

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد واعمر قلبي بطاعتك
english translation text: O` Allah! Bless Mohammad and his progeny and fill my heart with Your obedience,

arabic text: ولا تخزني بمعصيتك وارزقني مواساة من قترت عليه من رزقك
english translation text: Do not humiliate me with Your disobedience and grant me compassion for the one whom You have given less of Your sustenance
through what You have granted me of Your grace,
And spread for me of Your justice,
And have kept me alive under Your Protection.

This is the month of Your Prophet
The Chief of Your Messengers,
Sha’ban,

Which You have lightened (the burden)
by Your mercy and pleasure,

arabic text: الذي كان رسول الله صلى الله عليه وآله يدأب لك في صيامه وقيامه
english translation text: in which the Messenger of Allah blessings of Allah be on him and his family, persevered in fasting and standing up (in worship)
During its night and days,
Favorable with You in giving it (Sha’ban) its (due) respect and honor,
till his last breath.

arabic text: اللهم فأعنا على الاستنان بسنته فيه
english translation text: O Allah, so help us to follow his ways in it,
and achieve his intercession.

O Allah, make him for me,
an intercessor, a medium
(one whose intercession is accepted)
A smooth path towards You,
Make me from his followers,

arabic text: حتى ألقاك يوم القيامة عني راضيا
english translation text: until I meet you on the day of Judgement and You are pleased with me,
overlooking my sins,

arabic text: قد أوجبت لي منك الرحمة والرضوان
english translation text:
awarding me from You,
mercy and pleasure
And sending me to the eternal home,
and place of the best

arabic text: اللهم صلي على محمد وآل محمد
english translation text:
O Alláh send Your blessings on
Muhammad and the family of Muhammad.
